name: petal-blizzard
description: Inflicts regular damage.

name: petal-dance
description: Hits every turn for 2-3 turns, then confuses the user.

name: phantom-force
description: User vanishes, dodging all attacks, and hits next turn. Hits through Protect and Detect.

name: pin-missile
description: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.

name: play-nice
description: Lowers the target’s Attack by one stage.

name: play-rough
description: Has a 10% chance to lower the target’s Attack by one stage.

name: pluck
description: If target has a berry, inflicts double damage and uses the berry.

name: poison-fang
description: Has a 50% chance to badly poison the target.

name: poison-gas
description: Poisons the target.

name: poison-jab
description: Has a 30% chance to poison the target.

name: poison-powder
description: Poisons the target.

name: poison-sting
description: Has a 30% chance to poison the target.

name: poison-tail
description: Has an increased chance for a critical hit and a 10% chance to poison the target.

name: poltergeist
description: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

name: pounce
description: The user attacks by pouncing on the target. This also lowers the target's Speed stat.

name: pound
description: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

name: powder-snow
description: Has a 10% chance to freeze the target.

name: power-gem
description: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

name: power-split
description: Averages Attack and Special Attack with the target.

name: power-swap
description: User swaps Attack and Special Attack changes with the target.

name: power-trick
description: User swaps Attack and Defense.

name: power-trip
description: Power is higher the more the user’s stats have been raised, to a maximum of 31×.

name: power-up-punch
description: Raises the user’s Attack by one stage after inflicting damage.

name: power-whip
description: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

name: precipice-blades
description: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

name: present
description: Randomly inflicts damage with power from 40 to 120 or heals the target for 1/4 its max HP.

name: protect
description: Prevents any moves from hitting the user this turn.

name: psybeam
description: Has a 10% chance to confuse the target.

name: psych-up
description: Discards the user’s stat changes and copies the target’s.

name: psychic
description: Has a 10% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.

name: psychic-fangs
description: Destroys Reflect and Light Screen.

name: psychic-noise
description: The user attacks the target with unpleasant sound waves. For two turns, the target is prevented from recovering HP through moves, Abilities, or held items.

name: psychic-terrain
description: Protects Pokémon on the ground from priority moves and increases the power of their Psychic moves by 50%.

name: psycho-boost
description: Lowers the user’s Special Attack by two stages after inflicting damage.

name: psycho-cut
description: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.

name: psycho-shift
description: Transfers the user’s major status effect to the target.

name: psyshock
description: Inflicts damage based on the target’s Defense, not Special Defense.

name: psywave
description: Inflicts damage between 50% and 150% of the user’s level.

name: punishment
description: Power increases against targets with more raised stats, up to a maximum of 200.

name: pursuit
description: Has double power against, and can hit, Pokémon attempting to switch out.

name: quash
description: Makes the target act last this turn.

name: quick-attack
description: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

name: quick-guard
description: Prevents any priority moves from hitting friendly Pokémon this turn.

name: quiver-dance
description: Raises the user’s Special Attack, Special Defense, and Speed by one stage each.

name: rage
description: If the user is hit after using this move, its Attack rises by one stage.

name: rain-dance
description: Changes the weather to rain for five turns.

name: rapid-spin
description: Frees the user from binding moves, removes Leech Seed, and blows away Spikes.

name: razor-leaf
description: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.

name: razor-shell
description: Has a 50% chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.

name: razor-wind
description: Requires a turn to charge before attacking.

name: recover
description: Heals the user by half its max HP.

name: recycle
description: User recovers the item it last used up.

name: reflect
description: Reduces damage from physical attacks by half.

name: reflect-type
description: User becomes the target’s type.

name: refresh
description: Cleanses the user of a burn, paralysis, or poison.

name: rest
description: User sleeps for two turns, completely healing itself.

name: retaliate
description: Has double power if a friendly Pokémon fainted last turn.

name: return
description: Power increases with happiness, up to a maximum of 102.

name: revenge
description: Inflicts double damage if the user takes damage before attacking this turn.

name: reversal
description: Inflicts more damage when the user has less HP remaining, with a maximum of 200 power.

name: rising-voltage
description: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

name: roar
description: Immediately ends wild battles. Forces trainers to switch Pokémon.

name: rock-blast
description: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.

name: rock-climb
description: Has a 20% chance to confuse the target.

name: rock-polish
description: Raises the user’s Speed by two stages.

name: rock-slide
description: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.

name: rock-smash
description: Has a 50% chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.

name: rock-throw
description: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

name: rock-tomb
description: Has a 100% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.

name: role-play

name: rollout
description: Power doubles every turn this move is used in succession after the first, resetting after five turns.

name: roost
description: Heals the user by half its max HP.

name: rototiller

name: round

name: sand-attack
description: Lowers the target’s accuracy by one stage.

name: sand-tomb
description: Prevents the target from fleeing and inflicts damage for 2-5 turns.

name: sandstorm
description: Changes the weather to a sandstorm for five turns.

name: scald

name: scale-shot

name: scary-face

name: scorching-sands
description: Has a 30% chance to burn the target.

name: scratch
description: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

name: screech

name: secret-power

name: seed-bomb
description: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

name: seismic-toss

name: self-destruct

name: shadow-claw
description: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.

name: shadow-punch

name: shadow-sneak

name: sheer-cold

name: shock-wave
description: Never misses.

description: Puts the target to sleep.

description: Has a 30% chance to poison the target.

description: Has a 30% chance to poison the target.

name: sludge-wave

name: smart-strike
description: Never misses.

description: Has a 40% chance to poison the target.

description: Requires a turn to charge before attacking.

description: Confuses the target.

description: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target.
